shipmentReference.description: Internal Odyssey shipment reference number or job number

sellerName.description: ISF Element 1a: Full legal name of the seller/exporter in UAE

sellerAddress.description: ISF Element 1b: Complete address of seller (street, city, country, postal code)

buyerName.description: ISF Element 2a: Full legal name of the buyer/importer in USA

buyerAddress.description: ISF Element 2b: Complete address of buyer (street, city, state, zip)

importerOfRecordNumber.description: ISF Element 3: IRS/EIN or CBP-assigned importer number of the US entity liable for duties

consigneeNumber.description: ISF Element 4: IRS/EIN or CBP-assigned number of US consignee

manufacturerName.description: ISF Element 5a: Full legal name of manufacturer or last-known supplier in UAE

manufacturerAddress.description: ISF Element 5b: Complete address of manufacturer/supplier

shipToPartyName.description: ISF Element 6a: Name of first US party to physically receive goods after CBP release

shipToPartyAddress.description: ISF Element 6b: Delivery address of ship-to party

countryOfOrigin.description: ISF Element 7: 2-letter ISO country code where goods were manufactured

htsNumber.description: ISF Element 8: Harmonized Tariff Schedule number (minimum 6 digits)

containerStuffingLocation.description: ISF Element 9: Name and address of physical location where goods were stuffed into container

consolidatorName.description: ISF Element 10a: Name of party who stuffed or arranged stuffing of container

vesselName.description: Name of the ocean vessel carrying the shipment

voyageNumber.description: Voyage or trip number of the vessel

scacCode.description: Standard Carrier Alpha Code (4-letter code of the ocean carrier)

estimatedDeparture.description: Estimated vessel departure date from UAE port (YYYY-MM-DD)

estimatedArrival.description: Estimated vessel arrival date at US port (YYYY-MM-DD)

commodityDescription.description: Plain English description of the cargo

numberOfPackages.description: Total number of packages/cartons/pallets and type

grossWeightKg.description: Total gross weight of shipment in kilograms

volumeCbm.description: Total volume of shipment in cubic meters

agentCode.description: Odyssey agent or customer code who submitted this shipment

caseId.description: Maestro Case ID — passed to AceIsfFiling tool for storage bucket pathing

isfReadyToFile.description: True if all required ISF fields are validated and the package is ready to file on ACE

missingFields.description: Comma-separated list of required fields that are missing or blank

isfChecklist.description: Complete ISF 10+2 checklist showing each element and its validation status

filingDeadline.description: Calculated ISF filing deadline (24 hours before estimated vessel loading)

filingDeadlineMet.description: True if current time is before the filing deadline

isfPackageJson.description: Complete validated ISF data as JSON string, ready for ACE_ISF_Monitor
